__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: Berry-curvature signature in Hall transport for TaAs Weyl-semimetal single crystal — anomalous Hall angle at 2 K plus chiral-anomaly negative longitudinal magnetoresistance signature
predicted_unit: degrees (anomalous Hall angle at 2 K, Berry-curvature contribution)

operating_conditions.sample: TaAs single crystal, chemical-vapor-transport (CVT) grown, oriented (001) cleave
operating_conditions.geometry: Hall bar with current parallel to applied B for chiral-anomaly negative MR; transverse Hall for AHE extraction
operating_conditions.data_extraction: anomalous Hall component σ_xy^AHE after subtracting ordinary Hall + B-symmetric MR background

model_caveat: Universal FFs predict atomistic energies / forces on the TaAs lattice — they do NOT directly compute Berry curvature (which lives in the electronic-structure / Wannier-function domain) or Hall transport coefficients. Berry curvature requires DFT + Wannier interpolation around the Weyl-node manifold. The 7° Hall-angle value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: best-reported lab single-crystal AHE measurements + ARPES-confirmed Weyl-node positions. SEMI-QUANTITATIVE — NNP frames lattice stability only.
proxy_source: Huang et al. 2015 Nat. Commun. 6:7373 (TaAs Weyl-semimetal ARPES + transport, chiral-anomaly negative MR signature first reported); Lv et al. 2015 Nat. Phys. 11:728 (Weyl-fermion ARPES observation in TaAs); Zhang et al. 2016 Nat. Commun. 7:13142 (TaAs intrinsic anomalous Hall effect, Berry-curvature-dominated, Hall angle ~ 5-10° at 2 K); Hasan / Bansil / Cava Princeton TaAs / Weyl-semimetal corpus 2015-2024
falsifier_target_value: Berry curvature present in Hall measurement
falsifier_target_unit: qualitative (negative longitudinal MR + B-linear AHE term, both must be present)
falsifier_text: Berry curvature absent in Hall measurement (no negative longitudinal MR + no B-linear AHE term) → FAIL
delta_to_target: qualitative PASS (both signatures present in proxy)
unproven_markers_preserved: current jetting + extrinsic-MR artifacts contaminate negative-MR claims (Arnold 2016 + Reis 2016 controversies preserved verbatim per §4.C.4 risk-flags)
Berry-curvature Hall extraction requires careful subtraction of ordinary + anomalous Hall components UNVERIFIED outside academic single-crystal batches
TaAs single-crystal CVT growth is research-scale, not commodity (Wolfspeed / HRL prototype only)
Majorana fermion identification CONTESTED preserved verbatim per §3.12 + 2D-MATERIALS.md (Microsoft Station Q retractions 2018-2024)
honesty_caveats: F-WEYL-1 is a qualitative falsifier — PASS at the proxy if BOTH chiral-anomaly negative longitudinal MR AND B-linear AHE term are present in transport. Huang 2015 + Zhang 2016 report both for TaAs single crystals, but academically contested over current-jetting artifact (preserved verbatim). PASS does NOT close the candidate; reproducibility across crystal batches UNVERIFIED. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms; Hasan / Bansil Princeton + Cava lab authority; Wolfspeed / HRL TaAs growth vendor (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
